text: Thank you for calling Silver Lining Insurance My name is Marcus To whom do I have the pleasure of speaking today
Hi Marcus this is Sarah Jenkins I am calling because a rock hit my windshield on the highway this morning and now there is a massive crack
I am sorry to hear that Sarah I am glad you are safe Do you have your policy number handy so I can pull up your glass coverage details
Yes just a second it is four four nine two zero Alpha I am really worried because I have a long road trip planned for tomorrow and I need this fixed immediately
I understand the urgency Looking at your Premier Plan you are fully covered for glass repair with a zero dollar deductible
I can schedule a mobile technician to come to your location this afternoon
Oh that would be a huge relief Does it matter that I am at my office and not at home
Not at all We just need the vehicle location and a contact number Shall I proceed with the booking for the two PM slot
Yes please That works perfectly for me Thank you so much for making this easy
It is my pleasure Sarah I am processing that now You will receive a confirmation text shortly Is there anything else I can assist with
